## Key Findings

### "Scimplify" — Science-First Specialty Chemicals Platform

**What it does:** Full-stack platform for R&D, sourcing and manufacturing of specialty chemicals — 3,000+ products across Agrochemicals, Pharma, Flavours & Fragrances, Industrial. Network of 250+ manufacturing plants, 40+ in-house scientists, 20+ countries.

**Why it appears in chemicals research batch:** Scimplify IS a chemicals company — it helps chemical buyers identify, develop, source and manufacture chemicals. A counterparty likely uses their platform for specialty chemical procurement.
